title: PlausiDen — typed substrate for software that lasts
description: A typed-substrate platform for teams that want their tools to outlive their dependencies. Explicit contracts. Audited builds. Privacy-first by default.

sections.text: PlausiDen Forge 0.18 — typed CMS pipeline now ships with --json gates and SLSA-attested SBOMs. See changelog.

sections.title: Software that lasts a thousand years.
sections.lede: PlausiDen is a typed-substrate platform for teams that want their tools to outlive their dependencies. Explicit contracts at every boundary, audited at every commit, designed for the privacy-first internet.

sections.text: Every PlausiDen tool shares the same contracts, the same audit pipeline, the same reproducible-build guarantees. Pick what you need — the rest stays out of your way until you do.

Your content is JSON. JSON deserialises to typed Rust. Typed Rust renders the HTML you actually want to ship. No template-string SQL. No half-typed YAML. No hidden coupling. Every block, every page, every export — checked at the boundary.

sections.caption: A CmsSection that fails the WCAG-1.1.1 validator at parse time, not at publish time.

items.hint: Workspace-wide. All green at last main.
No analytics. No external font CDNs. Self-hosted everything.
From tokens to CSP to a11y landmarks to per-theme contrast.
Including AMOLED-true dark, high-contrast pair, sepia, warm, ocean, forest.
Every workspace member gets a sigstore-attested CycloneDX 1.5 SBOM.

sections.body: We replaced three SaaS subscriptions with a single Forge build. Reports go straight to compliance and our auditor stopped asking questions.
PlausiDen made our typed CMS shippable in a week. We deleted the WordPress instance and never looked back. The reproducible-build guarantee alone is worth the migration.
Crawler caught two accessibility regressions before the next deploy. That alone paid for the year. The typed runtime audit is unlike anything else we've used.

sections.caption: Run forge build. Get a typed report. Ship.
sections.body:
$ forge build
== phase: tokens ==
  ok      no findings (1ms)
== phase: html_semantic ==
  ok      no findings (2ms)
== phase: csp ==
  ok      no findings (0ms)
== phase: a11y_landmarks ==
  ok      no findings (1ms)
== phase: theme_contrast ==
  ok      no findings (28ms)
== summary ==
  mode:                production
  strict findings:     0
  duration:            66ms
  chain length:        27
  signature:           ed25519 (verified)
  report:              reports/build-20260518T074342Z.json

forge build OK

sections.title: Try the platform
body: PlausiDen is free for solo developers and personal projects. Team plans start at zero for the first three seats and scale by build-minute, not by user.
Pre-order with no card — we'll email you when your tenant is provisioned. Everything you ship is yours; we keep no copy.

sections.title: Ship typed in 60 seconds.
sections.lede: Install Forge, point it at a directory of JSON, get a reproducible audit-signed static site. No accounts. No clouds. Just types.
